events.title: From Burnout to Balance

coverImage.alt: From Burnout to Balance event cover

events.shortDescription: An event exploring strategies for managing burnout and finding balance in your career and life.

events.title: She Sharp & academyEX: International Women's Day 2026

coverImage.alt: She Sharp & academyEX International Women's Day 2026 - Together We Can Forge Gender Equality Collectively

events.shortDescription: Join She Sharp and academyEX for an inspiring International Women's Day celebration centred on this year's theme — Give To Gain. An evening of honest conversations, shared experiences, and meaningful connections.

detailPageData.title: She Sharp & academyEX: International Women's Day 2026
detailPageData.subtitle: Celebrating women. Inspiring action. Driving equity.
fullDescription: She Sharp is partnering again with academyEX for International Women's Day 2026, creating space for our community to connect, reflect, and take meaningful action toward gender equality.

This year's IWD theme, Give To Gain, is a reminder that progress grows through community. When we give our time, support, knowledge, and encouragement, we help open doors for women and girls — and everyone benefits.

Join us for a welcoming evening focused on honest conversations, shared experiences, and building connections. This event is about showing up for one another and taking small but meaningful steps together.
Tickets are available at three tiers: Donation/Koha (free), Students ($15 NZD), and Professionals ($20 NZD). No refunds.

speakers.name: Ana Ivanovic-Tongue
speakers.title: Chief Delivery Officer
speakers.bio: Ana Ivanovic-Tongue leads large-scale learning programmes at academyEX, partnering with public and private organisations across New Zealand and Australia. She blends deep programme leadership expertise with a passion for making innovation in learning practical, scalable and human. A member of New Zealand's AI Forum Executive Council, Ana contributes to national conversations on AI adoption and innovation. With 25 years' experience across arts, culture, government, digital transformation and EdTech, plus a Master of Technological Futures focused on AI and art crime, she helps adults build confidence, creativity and resilience in the age of disruption.

speakers.name: Danubi Paim (Dani)
speakers.title: Founder, Property Besties
speakers.bio: Dani Paim bought her first property at 19 with no safety net — just determination and fear. Today she's the founder of Property Besties, New Zealand's most collaborative property investor community (100+ members), and Wealth & Wellness Co., helping women build financial independence without sacrificing what matters most. A former financial advisor, Dani saw women needed clarity, confidence and community — not more information. She left the 9–5 to create supportive, values-driven spaces. She's coached 200+ Kiwis and is on a mission to help 1,000 women invest in property while living fully now, not just at retirement.

speakers.name: Wyndi Tagi
speakers.title: Co-Founder WE Mana & The Table
speakers.bio: Wyndi Tagi is a business strategist, speaker, and community builder passionate about helping people live with purpose and lead with mana. After building and successfully exiting her accounting firm, she now supports purpose-driven founders to grow sustainable businesses without losing themselves in the process. As founder of The Table, a global community for culturally aligned business owners, Wyndi creates spaces where women belong, build, and become. She believes in the power of "Give To Gain" — that when women share wisdom, courage, and support, everyone rises.

speakers.name: Annette Rangi
speakers.title: GM - Digital Transformation
speakers.bio: Annette Rangi is GM of Digital Transformation at HEB Construction, bringing extensive leadership experience across IT, digital delivery, and business transformation. With a career spanning roles as CTO, GM Operations, and Programme Manager across sectors including construction, retail, energy, and government, she champions agile leadership, innovation, and emerging technology adoption. A passionate advocate for diversity, Annette has coached and mentored teams of over 150 people and is experienced in Scaled/Lean-Agile, SAFe, SCRUM, and DevOps methodologies.

speakers.name: Camille Elemia
speakers.title: Journalist turned Product Manager, NZME
speakers.bio: Camille Elemia is an award-winning international journalist turned digital product manager at NZME, where she helps shape the future of digital news experiences at the New Zealand Herald. Over 15 years she reported for The New York Times, BBC, Bloomberg, and Al Jazeera, turning complex global issues into compelling stories. A Fulbright fellow and author of the book Unrequited Love: Duterte's China Embrace, Camille is currently completing a Master of Technological Futures at academyEX, exploring emerging disruptive technologies and their social impact.

events.title: She Sharp & Candice Murray: Own your Energy!

coverImage.alt: She Sharp & Candice Murray: Own your Energy! workshop banner

events.shortDescription: An interactive career mindset workshop with coach Candice Murray, focused on helping you consciously shift your energy so you can show up with more calm, confidence, and self-belief in the moments that matter.

detailPageData.title: She Sharp & Candice Murray: Own your Energy!
detailPageData.subtitle: Career Mindset Workshop
fullDescription: How you feel directly impacts how you show up at work and in life. In this engaging and practical workshop, Career Mindset Coach Candice Murray will guide you through how to consciously choose and access the emotional state that would be most helpful right now — whether that is calm, confidence, self-belief, or happiness.
You will learn powerful, easy-to-use tools that help you shift your energy on demand, so you can perform at your best in the moments that matter, from important conversations to everyday challenges.

The session is designed to be interactive, supportive, and fun, creating a safe space to reflect, participate, and experiment with new ways of thinking and responding. You will leave feeling energised and equipped with practical tools you can immediately apply in both your career and personal life.
The event flow includes time for registration and networking, a 90-minute workshop, and post-workshop networking to connect with other attendees.

speakers.name: Candice Murray
speakers.title: Career Mindset Coach
speakers.bio: Candice Murray is a Career Mindset Coach recognised as one of Influence Digest Media's Top Coaches in Auckland for 2024 and 2025. She has delivered workshops for organisations including AWS, Spark New Zealand, and AUT University, helping professionals build confidence, clarity, and momentum. Drawing on her own background in tech, she is known for her warm, relatable facilitation style and her ability to translate mindset concepts into practical, real-world tools.
